description: Minun lead team built around Minun's speed and coverage with Quick Attack/Swift/Grass Knot, Bellibolt as a bulky safe swap that farms with Sucker Punch and buffs defense with Parabolic Charge, and non-shadow Galvantula as closer with Energy Ball for shields-down scenarios.
performanceNotes: Went 5-0 in first set starting at 2800 ELO, climbing to 2860
Minun beats Shadow Luxray with Hidden Power Ground in all even-shield scenarios
Non-shadow Galvantula specifically chosen over shadow for the Lanturn matchup (takes 3 per Water Gun vs 4)

sources.videoTitle: Minun is your WORST NIGHTMARE in the Electric Cup! | Pokémon GO Battle League
sources.author: HomeSliceHenry

description: Shadow Alolan Graveler lead with Hisuian Electrode safe swap and Galvantula closer for Electric Cup. Rock Throw pressure from Graveler handles fliers and bugs, Electrode covers Lantern, and Galvantula cleans up with Lunge debuffs.
performanceNotes: Went 4-1 in first set and played back-to-back sets in the 2600s ELO range
Graveler's Rock Throw farms down Rotom and other key leads effectively
Electrode dominates the Lantern matchup which is common in the meta

description: ABA strong to galvalantula. Test team
